3216770.name: Spaceship Down
3216770.description:
In Spaceship Down, you play as Noah, an unlucky junior tech stranded on the derelict ship Clementine after a catastrophic crash. Severely injured, you must use every scrap, tool, and clever workaround to navigate the wreckage, rigging makeshift repairs in a desperate bid for survival. Guided by a witty narrator and a chipper AI, AURA, your journey is part escape room, part space mystery, with challenges that balance humour and tension. Solve puzzles, piece together the ship’s secrets, and try to stay alive—before the Clementine decides you’re just another bit of space junk.

  • Completely explorable ship

  • Multiple endings

  • Lots of easter eggs

  • Story driven gameplay
3216770.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
